synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21070 Oracle Linux 8 gcc-toolset-14 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21070
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21070

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21070.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gcc-toolset-14-14.0-1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-runtime-14.0-1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gcc-toolset-14-14.0-1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-runtime-14.0-1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/gcc-toolset-14-14.0-1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[14.0-1]
- Drop the sudo wrapper script (RHEL-90064)
